Poisson log-normal model for fish species: network inference

S. Robin

nov 2021

Data

  • \(n =89\) stations (sites) in the Barents’ sea
  • \(m = 30\) fish species
  • \(d = 4\) environmental covariates: latitude, longitude, depth, temperature
rm(list=ls()); palette('R3')
data <- read.table("BarentsFish.csv", header=TRUE, sep=';')
dataName <- 'BarentsFish'
rownames(data) <- data[, 1]; data <- data[, -1]
X <- as.matrix(data[, 1:4]); Y <- as.matrix(data[, 5:ncol(data)])
n <- nrow(Y); m <- ncol(Y); d <- ncol(X)
print(head(X))
##     Latitude Longitude Depth Temperature
## 356    71.10     22.43   349        3.95
## 357    71.32     23.68   382        3.75
## 358    71.60     24.90   294        3.45
## 359    71.27     25.88   304        3.65
## 363    71.52     28.12   384        3.35
## 364    71.48     29.10   344        3.65
print(head(Y[, 1:10]))
##     Re_hi An_de An_mi Hi_pl An_lu Me_ae Ra_ra Mi_po Ar_at No_rk
## 356     0     0     0    31     0   108     0   325     0     0
## 357     0     0     0     4     0   110     0   349     0     1
## 358     0     0     0    27     0   788     0     6     0     0
## 359     0     0     1    13     0   295     0     2     0     0
## 363     0     0     0    23     0    13     2   240     0     0
## 364     1     0     0    20     0    97     0     0     0     0
library(fields)
PlotCov <- function(fit, cluster=NULL){
  if(is.null(cluster)){order <- 1:nrow(fit$model_par$Sigma)}else{order <- order(cluster)}
  Sigma <- as.matrix(fit$model_par$Sigma)[order, order]; Sigma[which(Sigma==0)] <- NA
  Omega <- as.matrix(fit$model_par$Omega)[order, order]; Omega[which(Omega==0)] <- NA
  par(mfrow=c(1, 2))
  image.plot(1:m, 1:m, cov2cor(Sigma), xlab='species', ylab='species', main='correlations')
  abline(h=.5+cumsum(table(cluster)), v=.5+cumsum(table(cluster)))
  image.plot(1:m, 1:m, cov2cor(Omega), xlab='species', ylab='species', main='conditional correlations')
  abline(h=.5+cumsum(table(cluster)), v=.5+cumsum(table(cluster)))
}
library(sna)
PlotNet <- function(fit, color=rep(1, nrow(fit$model_par$Omega))){
  adj <- 1*(fit$model_par$Omega!=0)
  gplot(adj, gmode='graph', vertex.col=color, vertex.border=color, edge.lwd=abs(fit$model_par$Omega), edge.col=8)
}

PLN model

Diagonal covariance matrix

No interaction: \(\Omega\) and \(\Sigma\) diagonal

library(PLNmodels)
plnDiag <- PLN(Y ~ X, control=PLN_param(trace=0, covariance='diagonal'))
plnDiagCrit <- c(unlist(plnDiag$criteria), c(n_edges=0, EBIC=plnDiag$criteria$BIC, pen_loglik=plnDiag$criteria$loglik, density=0))
print(plnDiagCrit)
##   nb_param     loglik        BIC        ICL    n_edges       EBIC pen_loglik 
##    180.000  -8863.713  -9267.691  -6908.355      0.000  -9267.691  -8863.713 
##    density 
##      0.000
PlotCov(plnDiag)

Full covariance matrix

All interactions: \(\Omega\) and \(\Sigma\) full

plnFull <- PLN(Y ~ X, control=PLN_param(trace=0, covariance='full'))
plnFullCrit <- c(unlist(plnFull$criteria), c(n_edges=m*(m-1)/2, EBIC=plnFull$criteria$BIC, pen_loglik=plnFull$criteria$loglik, density=1))
print(plnFullCrit)
##   nb_param     loglik        BIC        ICL    n_edges       EBIC pen_loglik 
##    615.000  -8421.715  -9801.970  -7442.634    435.000  -9801.970  -8421.715 
##    density 
##      1.000
PlotCov(plnFull)

Abiotic effects

Xsd <- apply(X, 2, sd)
beta <- diag(Xsd) %*% (plnFull$model_par$B[-1, ])
cluster <- kmeans(t(beta), centers=5, iter.max=1e2, nstart=1e2)$cluster
par(mfrow=c(1, 3))
image.plot(1:d, 1:m, plnFull$model_par$B[-1, ], main='abiotic effects', xlab='covariates', ylab='species')
text(1:d, rep(2, d), labels=substr(colnames(X), 1, 4), col=0)
image.plot(1:d, 1:m, beta, main='normalized effects', xlab='covariates', ylab='species')
text(1:d, rep(2, d), labels=substr(colnames(X), 1, 4), col=0)
image.plot(1:d, 1:m, beta[, order(cluster)], main='reordering species', xlab='covariates', ylab='species')
abline(h=.5+cumsum(table(cluster)), col=0, lwd=2)
text(1:d, rep(2, d), labels=substr(colnames(X), 1, 4), col=0)

Network inference

Few interactions: \(\Omega\) sparse

plnNet <- PLNnetwork(Y ~ X, control=PLNnetwork_param(trace=0))
plot(plnNet)

Extending the grid for the penalty parameter \(\lambda\)

lambda <- max(plnNet$penalties)^(seq(-5, 1, length.out=50))
plnNet <- PLNnetwork(Y ~ X, penalties=lambda, control=PLNnetwork_param(trace=0))
plot(plnNet)

A first network

netBic <- plnNet$getBestModel(crit='BIC')
print(netBic$criteria)
##   nb_param    loglik       BIC       ICL n_edges      EBIC pen_loglik   density
## 1      303 -7961.959 -8641.987 -6282.971     123 -8719.672  -7969.793 0.2733333
PlotCov(netBic)

par(mfrow=c(1, 2))
plot(netBic)
## Warning: vertex attribute frame.color contains NAs. Replacing with default
## value black
PlotNet(netBic, color=cluster)

Stability selection

Resampling procedure to assess edge robustness

stability_selection(plnNet)
## 
## Stability Selection for PLNnetwork: 
## subsampling: ++++++++++++++++++++
netStab <- plnNet$getBestModel(crit='StARS')
print(netStab$criteria)
##   nb_param    loglik       BIC       ICL n_edges      EBIC pen_loglik
## 1      222 -8338.677 -8836.916 -6477.839      42 -8886.007  -8351.232
##      density
## 1 0.09333333
par(mfrow=c(1, 2))
plot(netStab)
## Warning: vertex attribute frame.color contains NAs. Replacing with default
## value black
PlotNet(netStab, color=cluster)

Model comparison

print(rbind(plnDiag = plnDiagCrit, 
            plnFull = plnFullCrit,
            netBic = netBic$criteria, 
            netStab = netStab$criteria))
##         nb_param    loglik       BIC       ICL n_edges      EBIC pen_loglik
## plnDiag      180 -8863.713 -9267.691 -6908.355       0 -9267.691  -8863.713
## plnFull      615 -8421.715 -9801.970 -7442.634     435 -9801.970  -8421.715
## netBic       303 -7961.959 -8641.987 -6282.971     123 -8719.672  -7969.793
## netStab      222 -8338.677 -8836.916 -6477.839      42 -8886.007  -8351.232
##            density
## plnDiag 0.00000000
## plnFull 1.00000000
## netBic  0.27333333
## netStab 0.09333333

Comparing estimated abiotic effects

abiotics = cbind(plnDiag = as.vector(diag(Xsd) %*% plnDiag$model_par$B[-1, ]), 
            plnFull = as.vector(diag(Xsd) %*% plnFull$model_par$B[-1, ]),
            netBic = as.vector(diag(Xsd) %*% netBic$model_par$B[-1, ]), 
            netStab = as.vector(diag(Xsd) %*% netStab$model_par$B[-1, ]))
plot(as.data.frame(abiotics), pch=20)

Not accounting for environment

PLN model

plnNoCovar <- PLN(Y ~ 1, control=PLN_param(trace=0))
PlotCov(plnNoCovar)

PlotCov(plnNoCovar, cluster=cluster)

plnNoCovarCrit <- c(unlist(plnNoCovar$criteria), 
                    c(n_edges=m*(m-1)/2, EBIC=plnNoCovar$criteria$BIC,
                      pen_loglik=plnNoCovar$criteria$loglik, density=0))

Network inference

plnNetNoCovar <- PLNnetwork(Y ~ 1, penalties=lambda, control=PLNnetwork_param(trace=0))
netNoCovarBic <- plnNetNoCovar$getBestModel(crit='BIC')
PlotCov(netNoCovarBic, cluster=cluster)

stability_selection(plnNetNoCovar)
## 
## Stability Selection for PLNnetwork: 
## subsampling: ++++++++++++++++++++
netNoCovarStab <- plnNetNoCovar$getBestModel(crit='StARS')
PlotCov(netNoCovarStab, cluster=cluster)
